---
name: Clarification needed
about: Use when seeking clarity on behavior, policy, or expected functionality that
  only Amazon can provide.
title: "[CLARIFICATION]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the clarification needed**
A clear and concise description of what is unclear and what is needed to get clarity. I agree to:
- Use this only if the community is unlikely to be able to help out via Slack or Github Discussions, this clarity request is primarily addressing Amazon. 
- Stay calm, respectful, and professional, and to focus on facts and observable behavior
- Keep each issue focused on a single topic
- Add relevant comments or updates if new information becomes available

**Additional context**
Add any other context that might help someone bring clarity to your issue.
